title: verbascum × pilatii
intro: Verbascum × pilatii, also known as Giant Mullein, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Verbascum phoeniceum and Verbascum lychnitis, belonging to the figwort family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant qualities, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Verbascum × pilatii include soothing respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate pain. Verbascum × pilatii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
